name: @aukora/spatial
description: The Aukora Spatial shell — a subtractive transplant of the donor Symbiote Spatial app (aukora-symbiote/spatial, byte-identical files per provenance.json) reduced to the R34 roster. The shell, thirds geometry, chats lane, organs, tokens, and safe-lab law are the donor's exact code; only the registry/menu was subtracted and a CONSOLE center-pane organ (ours) added.
author: Aumara
